verdict.summary: Guide is broadly useful, but it contains a major outdated/confusing nationality-law note and a materially wrong condition for the 180-day parental subsidy rate, plus a few misleading simplifications.

issues.current: Реформа закона о гражданстве 2026: TC ruled 49/XVII unconstitutional, 48/XVII still pending DRE — проверяйте актуальный статус
issues.problem: This is confusing/outdated for the requested April 2026 reference point. The key status to communicate is that the new nationality law was approved on 01.04.2026 and was awaiting promulgation; until promulgation/publication/in-force, the current Lei da Nacionalidade rules still apply. The text also uses unexplained bill numbers and an English fragment inside a Russian guide.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "На апрель 2026 новая редакция закона о гражданстве была одобрена парламентом 01.04.2026, но ещё ожидала промульгации/публикации и вступления в силу. До вступления изменений в силу применяются действующие правила Lei da Nacionalidade; проверяйте статус в Diário da República/на сайте Assembleia da República."
issues.source: Assembleia da República — processo legislativo da Lei da Nacionalidade; Diário da República

issues.current: 180 дней при разделении — **90%**, если после обязательного периода матери каждый родитель берёт предусмотренный законом исключительный период (например, 30 последовательных дней или два периода по 15 дней) согласно правилам Segurança Social
issues.problem: The condition stated is not the condition for the 90% rate. The 30 consecutive days / two periods of 15 days rule is the basic sharing condition used for the shared initial leave regimes. The enhanced 90% rate for 180 days requires a stronger sharing condition, commonly described as each parent taking, consecutively, 60 days or two periods of 30 days after the mother's mandatory post-birth period.
issues.suggestion: Write: "180 дней при разделении — обычно 83%; может быть 90%, если выполнены усиленные условия разделения, в частности после обязательного периода матери каждый родитель берёт подряд 60 дней или два периода по 30 дней, согласно актуальным правилам Segurança Social." If you want to avoid edge-case errors, say readers must verify the rate in the current Segurança Social table before applying.
issues.source: Segurança Social — Guia Prático: Subsídio Parental; Decreto-Lei 91/2009 as amended by Lei 13/2023

issues.current: Subsídio Parental платит Segurança Social. Рассчитывается по средней зарплате за последние 6 месяцев. Подача в Segurança Social Direta, обычно автоматически после регистрации ребёнка.
issues.problem: Two simplifications are misleading. The reference remuneration is not simply the last 6 calendar months; it is normally based on the first 6 months of the last 8 months before the relevant event, with specific exclusions/rules. Also the subsidy is not something families should assume will be paid automatically after birth registration; in practice it normally requires a request via Segurança Social Direta or Segurança Social, and late filing can reduce entitlement.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Subsídio Parental платит Segurança Social. Remuneração de referência обычно считается по первым 6 месяцам из последних 8 месяцев до события, по правилам Segurança Social. Заявление подают через Segurança Social Direta/службу Segurança Social; не рассчитывайте на автоматическую выплату после регистрации рождения. Срок — обычно 6 месяцев с первого дня периода, за который запрашивается пособие."
issues.source: Segurança Social — Guia Prático: Subsídio Parental

issues.current: Licença Parental Inicial section lists 120/150/180 days and father's leave, but does not explicitly state the mother's exclusive/mandatory periods.
issues.problem: For a practical pregnancy/birth guide this is an important caveat: the mother may take up to 30 days of initial parental leave before birth and must take 42 consecutive days after birth. Without this, the sharing rules are harder to understand.
issues.suggestion: Add an item: "Мать: может взять до 30 дней licença parental inicial до родов; 42 дня подряд после родов обязательны для матери."
issues.source: Código do Trabalho art. 41; Segurança Social — parentalidade

issues.current: Licença para assistência a filho — до 2 лет без оплаты (гарантия возврата на работу)
issues.problem: Incomplete: the unpaid leave for assistance to a child is generally up to 2 years, but can be up to 3 years for a third or subsequent child. There are also separate rules for children with disability/chronic illness/oncological disease.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Licença para assistência a filho — обычно до 2 лет без оплаты; до 3 лет для третьего и последующих детей; отдельные более длительные режимы возможны при инвалидности/хроническом или онкологическом заболевании ребёнка."

issues.current: Чрезмерное использование кесарева (40-60% против 25-30% в SNS)
issues.problem: The direction is correct, but the numbers are presented as precise without a source and may be outdated/too low for private-sector cesarean rates, which in Portugal are often reported above 60% in private hospitals, while public/SNS rates are closer to the low-30% range depending on year and unit.
issues.suggestion: Either cite a current official/statistical source or soften: "В частном секторе доля кесаревых существенно выше, чем в SNS; по последним доступным данным она может превышать 60% в частных учреждениях, тогда как в государственных обычно около трети родов. Проверяйте данные ERS/DGS/INE за актуальный год."

issues.current: к частному гинекологу (25-100 € за первый приём)
issues.problem: The lower end is likely misleading for 2026 private obstetrics/gynecology in major cities. €25 is more typical only with strong insurance/network copay or special agreements, not a normal uninsured first private appointment.
issues.suggestion: Write: "к частному гинекологу — часто около €70–120+ без страховки; с медицинской страховкой/планом copay может быть значительно ниже, например €15–40."
issues.source: Private provider price lists vary; verify with CUF/Luz/Lusíadas/Trofa Saúde tariffs

issues.current: Если его нет/он закрыт — регистрацию делают в Conservatória do Registo Civil или через доступные онлайн-сервисы.
issues.problem: Online birth registration has eligibility/authentication constraints and is not universally available to every foreign parent in every situation. The text may make it sound like a guaranteed fallback.
issues.suggestion: Write: "...или, если родители соответствуют условиям онлайн-сервиса и имеют подходящую аутентификацию, через онлайн-регистрацию nascimento; иначе — в Conservatória do Registo Civil."

missing_topics: Mention newborn screening: Teste do Pezinho/Programa Nacional de Rastreio Neonatal, normally between the 3rd and 6th day of life.
Mention first newborn follow-up at Centro de Saúde/USF and vaccination under the Programa Nacional de Vacinação.
Mention the mother's mandatory 42-day post-birth leave and optional up to 30 days before birth in the main parental leave explanation.
Mention that private maternity insurance usually has waiting periods/carências and pregnancy/childbirth may be excluded if the policy is bought after pregnancy begins.
Mention parents' right to an accompanying person during labour/birth and possible hospital-specific operational limits.
Mention that emergency obstetric capacity can be affected by temporary closures/rotations of maternity emergency departments, so SNS 24/112 guidance matters near delivery.
